THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BUU-BUU.0-0.char: Heehee... big maze. Big snacks too?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BUU-BUU.0-1.ancient: You joke, but your hunger is not simple.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BUU-BUU.1-0.char: [sine]Buu can be kind.[/sine] [jitter]Buu can be catastrophe.[/jitter]
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BUU-BUU.1-1.ancient: [jitter]Then choose well.[/jitter] The tower remembers every shape you take.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BUU-BUU.1-2.char: Good Buu, bad Buu, super Buu... all still Buu.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.BUU-BUU.1-3.ancient: Then let your many selves answer one trial.
